title: JORDAN CROSSING - 211info
text: JORDAN CROSSING JORDAN CROSSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sober living and transitional housing. Offers a recovery home that addresses addiction, homelessness, and other barriers through structured support, faith-based education, prayer, and Bible studies. Eligibility: Men age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (458) 800-4208 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (458) 800-4208 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jefferson County Services: Recovery Homes/Halfway Houses If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
